name: Canadian Souffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and spread it on the bottom and sides of individual souffle dishes. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
2. Beat egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored, about 5 minutes.
3. Add cream cheese, cheddar cheese, sour cream, pimento, chives, and mustard to the beaten yolks. Mix well.
4. Using clean, dry beaters, whip egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold the whipped egg whites into the yolk mixture alternately in three additions.
6. Fold in the diced Canadian bacon.
7. Pour batter evenly into prepared souffle dishes.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
